report.summary: Standup v8 (06:05 CET): 331 pages live, PUBLISH_QUEUE has 2 items (aztec-network-guide + HIP-3 guide from build-v5), CRITICAL next.config.ts blocker persists, FOMC now T-2 (Wed Mar 18), rate limiter still 0/6 — all 6 agents ran last cycle.

sections.title: Analytics — Delta Since Last Cycle (v7)
items: Pages live: 331 confirmed by EOD v6 (+3 from v7's corrected count of 328). Delta came from publish-queue promotions during the last cycle — pages now resolving correctly.

PUBLISH_QUEUE: Now 2 items — /learn/aztec-network-guide (Day 37, carried over from v7) + /learn/hyperliquid-hip3-tokenized-futures-guide (NEW — added by build-v5 this cycle). Both ready to promote in next publish cycle.

Build-v5 content shipped: Hyperliquid HIP-3 guide written (3,200 words), Hip3FundingCalculator.tsx component built (5 markets: oil, equities, gold, silver, single stock), full JSON-LD schemas (Article + FAQ + HowTo). Page scaffolded into PUBLISH_QUEUE. High-intent keyword cluster: 'tokenized futures', 'on-chain commodity trading', 'Hyperliquid HIP-3'.

GSC organic signals: Day 17 confirmed active — organic clicks arriving across indexed pages. FOMC is T-2 (Wed Mar 18). Yield/DCA/stablecoin yield/defi-yields search queries in peak intent window. New HIP-3 guide adds commodity futures angle ahead of FOMC macro narrative.

API deployment gap confirmed by EOD v6: only 1 of 6 API routes live in production (/api/market-metrics). Remaining 5 routes (prices, trending, fear-greed, market-dominance, defi-yields) are staged but uncommitted — no live traffic serving yet.
Community pipeline: 19 community cycles completed today total (v12–v19 + base). BTCFi, Aave V4, Kaito/InfoFi, FOMC prep content queued through Wednesday. Social calendar fully stocked for FOMC day.

sections.title: Project Manager — Done vs Carry-Over
items: SHIPPED ✅ Build v5 — Hyperliquid HIP-3 tokenized futures guide + Hip3FundingCalculator.tsx. Added to PUBLISH_QUEUE. New files: src/app/learn/hyperliquid-hip3-tokenized-futures-guide/page.tsx, src/components/Hip3FundingCalculator.tsx. Modified: src/lib/published-pages.ts.
SHIPPED ✅ EOD v6 cycle-close — 331 pages confirmed, 6 API routes structurally audited, DevOps/Data/PM sweep complete.
SHIPPED ✅ Community v19 — social calendar loaded for FOMC week; all platforms covered.
BLOCKER 🔴 [P0] Staged next.config.ts still drops `output: 'standalone'` — carried over from v7. No commit possible until `git restore --staged next.config.ts` is run. This has been P0 for 2+ cycles.
BLOCKER 🔴 [P0] Staged deletions of badges/page.tsx + courses/page.tsx + courses/[slug]/page.tsx — if committed as-is, 3 routes go 404. Must verify intent before any commit.
BLOCKER 🔴 middleware.ts working-tree merge conflict — must resolve before commit.
CARRY-OVER 🔴 Rate limiter: 0/6 API routes protected. FOMC T-2. checkRateLimit() wired to zero routes. ~30 min programmer task — highest urgency on board.

CARRY-OVER 🔴 438 staged files uncommitted — crypto-cards hub (31 pages), compare pages (92), courses (2), badges, airdrops, 4 new API routes. Doubly blocked: P0 config fix + JSON-LD validation on compare/crypto-cards.
CARRY-OVER 🔴 WalletConnect production Project ID — Jefe action required; blocks gamification + referral hooks.
CARRY-OVER 🔴 GitHub Actions secrets — Jefe ~15 min; blocks Playwright CI.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 AICourseRecommendations.tsx — 2 curly apostrophe TS errors (non-blocking).
CARRY-OVER 🟡 Vercel trial — ~8 days remaining. Jefe: add payment method.
CARRY-OVER 🟡 ~100 published slugs missing page.tsx (30% returning 404 in prod). Phased scaffolding needed.
UPCOMING ⚡ Publish Day 37 + Day 38: promote aztec-network-guide + hyperliquid-hip3-guide from PUBLISH_QUEUE in next publish cycle.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — Resolve all P0 staged blockers before any commit (CARRIED P0). Three blockers must be cleared in sequence: (1) `git restore --staged next.config.ts` to restore standalone output config — committing the current staged version breaks all 331+ Vercel pages instantly; (2) decide on badges/courses/[slug] staged deletions — if intentional, fine, if not, restore those files; (3) resolve middleware.ts working-tree merge conflict. None of these require Jefe input. This is a 15-minute programmer task that has been blocked for 2+ cycles. Clear it this cycle so the 438-file batch can finally ship.

PRIORITY 2 — Wire rate limiter across all 6 API routes NOW (T-2 to FOMC). Organic clicks are arriving (GSC Day 17), FOMC is Wednesday, and yield/DCA/stablecoin pages will receive their highest-ever traffic on rate-decision day. A single bot or traffic spike hits all 331 pages simultaneously via 6 unprotected endpoints. Import checkRateLimit() into /api/prices, /api/trending, /api/market-metrics, /api/market-dominance, /api/defi-yields, /api/fear-greed. ~30 min. This is the single highest-ROI technical task on the board with a hard deadline.

PRIORITY 3 — Promote Day 37 + Day 38 and write FOMC catalyst piece. Publish aztec-network-guide and hyperliquid-hip3-guide from PUBLISH_QUEUE (2 clean slots). Then build remaining capacity on 'How a Fed rate cut affects crypto yields in 2026' — targets DCA + lending + stablecoin yield + defi-yields keyword clusters in the FOMC window. Pair with Community FOMC tweet on Wednesday for compounding organic reach. HIP-3 guide's commodity angle (oil, gold, equity futures on-chain) is uniquely timely given macro FOMC context — position this as the 'trade macro on-chain' narrative for rate-decision day.
